Hello, I'm Bianca Surya Nobelia

Welcome to my personal website. I specialize in robotics, embedded systems, and AI, creating innovative solutions for complex engineering challenges.

View My Projects Get in Touch

About Me

A highly motivated and enthusiastic engineer with expertise in various aspects of robotics, including Embedded Systems, Automation, Electronics Design, IoT, DSP, FPGA, Computer Vision, Robot Operating System (ROS/ROS2) and Robotics Simulation.

I hold a track record of winning several national competitions and possess experience in research and development across avionics, automotive, and marine technology sectors. Currently focusing on building my career in advanced robotics and embedded systems, while continuously deepening my knowledge in electronics, AI, and autonomous systems.

Featured Projects

Balance Control System on ERISA Humanoid Dance Robot (GCoM-based Analysis)

Implemented a closed-loop balance controller for the 29-DoF ERISA humanoid dance robot using IMU-based pitch feedback, Five-Link GCoM analysis, and PD control.

Humanoid Robot ERISA Balance Control
View Project →

HMI/Touchscreen for Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger

Developed an HMI-based monitoring and operation interface for an EV charger. Implemented display control and charging-process monitoring, payment-method management, and fault detection.

HMI EV Charger Monitoring
View Project →

Automatic Guided Vehicle (AGV)

Autonomous material transport AGV for warehouse-to-production logistics.

Pixy camera NFC Proximity Sensor
View Project →

Semi-automatic Winding Machine

Semi-automatic machine that combines winding and insulation stripping to improve production output and reduce labor costs.

Automation Winding Insulation Stripping Pneumatic
View Project →

Mechanical Design

Design new products, calculate production costs, source suppliers, and build/test jigs for mass production.

3D Modelling Creo Technical Drawing
View Project →
